lessons.title: Synchronous vs Asynchronous
lessons.description: Understand the difference between blocking and non-blocking code.

lessons.title: Callbacks and Callback Hell
lessons.description: Learn about callback functions and the pyramid of doom.

lessons.title: Promises – A Better Way
lessons.description: Introduce promises, states, and basic usage.

lessons.title: Chaining Promises and Error Handling
lessons.description: Chain multiple async operations and handle errors with .catch().

lessons.title: Async/Await – Syntactic Sugar
lessons.description: Write asynchronous code that looks synchronous with async/await.
